query:
SELECT c.status, COUNT(DISTINCT pt.contract_external_id) as contracts,
       COUNT(*) as payment_rows,
       SUM(CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_amount
FROM payment_transactions pt
JOIN contracts c ON c.section = pt.section AND c.external_id = pt.contract_external_id
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM debt_collected_cache dcc
    WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND dcc.contract_external_id = pt.contract_external_id
      AND dcc.period = pt.period_no
  )
GROUP BY c.status;

SELECT c.status, COUNT(DISTINCT pt.contract_external_id) as contracts,
       COUNT(*) as payment_rows,
       SUM(CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_amount
FROM payment_transactions pt
JOIN contracts c ON c.section = pt.section AND c.external_id = pt.contract_external_id
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM debt_collected_cache dcc
    WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND dcc.contract_external_id = pt.contract_external_id
      AND dcc.period = pt.period_no
  )
GROUP BY c.status;
